summary: Iteration 4 frontend-only sweep. Dashboard.jsx compile-blocker from iteration_3 is fully resolved — /login and / render cleanly with no CRA overlay. Unauthenticated /login has ZERO 401s and ZERO console errors. Login with admin@ledger.app / admin123 succeeds and lands on Daily Log. Radix DialogDescription sweep passes for Add Payment, Calc Confirm, Add Client, and per-client Calculate dialogs. ONE remaining Radix warning: the Calc RESULT dialog (post-confirm on Dashboard Calculate Now) still emits 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' twice. Client search 'ravi' correctly matches Shree Ravi Kumar Ji. No console errors across the authenticated session.
passed: No CRA 'Compiled with problems' overlay on /login or /
Add Payment dialog opens without Radix warnings
Calculate Now confirm dialog opens without Radix warnings
Add Client dialog on /clients opens without Radix warnings
Per-client Calculate dialog on client detail opens without Radix warnings
Client search 'ravi' matches 'Shree Ravi Kumar Ji'
Client detail page renders (Shree Ravi Kumar Ji, net balance -₹14,445)

failed.issue: Radix DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby (warning fires twice when the 2-line result modal opens after confirming Calculate Now)
failed.evidence: Console: 'Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}.' (x2) captured immediately after clicking the confirm button in the Tally/Calc confirm dialog on the Dashboard.

action_items: Add <DialogDescription className="sr-only">…</DialogDescription> inside the Calculate RESULT dialog's DialogHeader in Dashboard.jsx (the 2-line result modal shown after Calculate Now confirmation). The confirm dialog is already fixed; only the result modal is missing it.

Note: warning fires twice, suggesting the result Dialog may be mounted/rendered in a way that duplicates the warning — verify only one DialogContent instance exists, or that a nested Dialog isn't also missing a description.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (9/10 checks; only Calc Result dialog Radix warning remains)

notes: Logout button was not explicitly asserted on client-detail page (test flow ended on client detail), but no auth-related console errors observed anywhere. EN↔हिं toggle click executed without error. Calendar/Today-Yesterday toggle not deep-tested in this pass — no visible errors during Dashboard visit.
